title: CI: localstack and vault images use floating 'latest' tag
description: .github/workflows/ci.yml uses localstack/localstack:latest and hashicorp/vault:latest in service containers. Upstream breaking changes (API changes, removed commands, renamed fields) will break CI without any code change in this repo. Trigger: LocalStack or Vault releases a breaking change → integration CI fails with no obvious cause. Pin to specific version tags (e.g. localstack/localstack:3.8 and hashicorp/vault:1.17).
